prompt: Review PR #4468 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds manual transaction checkpoint tracking for Data Streams Monitoring.

assertions.text: Flags missing concurrency protection (mutex/lock) on shared state
Suggests avoiding unnecessary byte slice allocation (append directly to destination)
Questions the naming — TrackTransaction is too generic for a DSM-specific function
Notes missing tests for new data structures or critical paths
Flags that the public API name should be more specific (e.g., TrackDataStreamsTransaction)
